projects.Description: Complete renovation of operating rooms A and B with new laminar flow ceilings and integrated OR systems
Add two new MRI bays with patient prep areas and waiting room expansion
Rooftop solar panel installation for energy offset and sustainability goals
20-bed expansion of emergency department with new trauma bays and observation unit
Replace aging pathology and genetics analyzers with next-gen systems
Upgrade server infrastructure, storage, and network for cloud-hybrid architecture
Structural concrete repair, waterproofing, and LED lighting upgrade
Add ambulatory surgery center and additional imaging suites
Replace legacy fire alarm panels with addressable system throughout hospital
Demolish abandoned north wing to prepare site for future construction
Replace aging rooftop units with high-efficiency variable speed systems
Expand warehouse storage with temperature-controlled pharmaceutical section
